hooks.command: echo 'Blocked: rm -rf is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: force push is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: force push is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
echo '## Git' && git branch --show-current && git status --short | head -10 && echo '' && git log --oneline -5
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs you" with title "Claude Code"'

changed=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then echo 'Code review required: Use the Agent tool to spawn a code-optimizer subagent to review all files changed this session for bugs, security issues, and performance problems. Pass it the list of modified files and tell it to run git diff HEAD~1 to orient itself.'; fi

changed=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then echo 'Agent updater required: You are the agent-updater from .claude/docs/agent-updater.md. Review files changed this session against the detection rules in that document. If docs need updating, list each affected file and section and ask for approval before changing anything. If nothing needs updating, stay completely silent.'; fi
